name: Can I sue my employer if I got hurt at work in Salt Lake City?
description: No, workers' comp is exclusive; sue third parties.[3]

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer if I got hurt at work in Salt Lake City?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, workers' comp is exclusive; sue third parties.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Generally no—Utah workers' comp is exclusive remedy, barring suits against employers.** Third-party negligence allows personal injury claims.[3][4] Key factors: Exceptions rare like gross negligence. File comp first, explore third parties. Limits employer liability but guarantees benefits.
